### MF-P6-02 — FastAPI inference service (spec: 13 §3)

- 🟨 **MF-P6-02.01** -- 99% -- `serve\api.py`: GET /health (versions, loaded models, VRAM) · GET /models (registry roles + champions) · POST /predict (multipart image + labels/return/inpaint params → base64 PNGs + manifest-lite JSON with per-label visibility guess, areas, provenance) · POST /refine (image + label + clicks → SAM2 single-part refine)
    - Note (2026-07-11T10:02:58+00:00, ai_agent): Serving audit while implementing MF-P6-02.05 confirms the default create_app runtime has no production predictor/refiner configuration: endpoint contracts are implemented, but maskfactory serve cannot fulfill live /predict or /refine until trained champion framework loaders and the SAM2 production loader are wired. The latency harness now fails closed on that boundary rather than accepting health-only readiness.
    - Note (2026-07-11T10:06:16+00:00, ai_agent): Default production runtime now wires /refine to a real on-demand SAM2 adapter: resolves hash-verified large+base-plus registry roles, validates integer in-bounds positive/negative clicks, embeds once with OOM fallback, selects stable highest predicted-IoU native mask, and always closes the embedding. Live construction resolved both current checkpoints/configs. Trained champion /predict loaders and live WSL request remain.
    - Note (2026-07-11T19:27:01+00:00, ai_agent): Production Mode-B now auto-configures only a complete set of verified champion_bodypart/champion_hand/champion_clothing roles. Each sequential MMSeg slot re-verifies checkpoint plus separately hashed inference config, requires an explicit ontology-valid class vocabulary, validates native integer prediction geometry/range, maps masks by class name, and unloads to CPU/clears CUDA before the next slot. Focused serving tests and 533-test full suite pass. Final live champion-backed WSL HTTP request remains gated by trained promoted checkpoints and this shell's absent WSL distro.
- 🟨 **MF-P6-02.02** -- 90% -- uvicorn bound 127.0.0.1:8765 inside WSL2 (localhost only) · `maskfactory serve --port 8765` command wired

    - Note (2026-07-11T09:03:00+00:00, ai_agent): Loopback-only CLI execution is now fixture-proven: maskfactory serve passes exact host 127.0.0.1, requested port, and info logging to uvicorn with no host override. Fixed authoritative lock omission by pinning python-multipart==0.0.32 beside FastAPI/Uvicorn. 8 serving tests pass; Ruff/diff clean. Live probe uncredited: Windows Python lacks FastAPI and exact workspace-target install timed out after 300s without index response; WSL remains absent.
- 🟨 **MF-P6-02.03** -- 98% -- Model residency per doc 05 §5 schedule: champion body-part + hand specialist + clothing parser sequential slots · SAM2 loaded on demand for /refine
    - Note (2026-07-11T08:52:12+00:00, ai_agent): Implemented deterministic sequential champion scheduler: ontology-routed body/hand/clothing slots load-call-close one at a time; verified roles resolved before configuration; SAM2 refiner loads/calls/closes only on /refine. configured_models and loaded_models are separated so idle health never claims co-residency; per-label provenance names its producing role. 15 serving/registry tests pass; Ruff/diff clean.     - Note (2026-07-11T10:06:17+00:00, ai_agent): Added a shared runtime request mutex around predictor/refiner heavy sections so concurrent FastAPI calls cannot co-reside GPU models. Focused serving tests and 533-test full suite pass. Final live champion-backed WSL HTTP request remains gated by trained promoted checkpoints and this shell's absent WSL distro.
